criticalRules: Configure step parameters: initial, time, final
Internal STEP block has ControlPort for activation
Output is the explicit signal from internal OUT_f
description: Step function signal generator - creates a step change at a specified time
anomalies: SuperBlock - contains internal STEP and OUT_f blocks

name: STEP_FUNCTION
